description: Error message from WLB bot showing failed file edit at /data/workspace/memory/2026-03-06.md due to text mismatch, timestamped 下午4:33.
Dark-themed WLB Skills dashboard listing 10 skills with dates from 2026-03-11 to 2026-03-21, showing project timeline and capabilities.
Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index v4.0 bar charts comparing 27 AI models by performance scores, with two views highlighting MiMo-V2-Pro and MiMo-V2-Flash.
Dark background with Chinese text proposing a timing system using hourglass and number emojis for progress indicators (10s, 20s, 30s+).
GitHub repository page for OpenClaw Railway Template showing 1-click deploy documentation, setup instructions, and troubleshooting guide.
Railway.app Trial Plan page showing $5 free credit, 2 vCPU/0.5GB RAM specs, with 'Keep Calm and Don't Blink' badge and Lenny's Product Pass discount highlighted.
Chat conversation between GSD and WLB bots debugging GitHub token issues and message synchronization via jj-mailbox system.
GSD bot sending single dot messages at regular intervals throughout a day, timestamps from 凌晨1:37 to 晚上10:37 showing heartbeat/keepalive pattern.
Chinese documentation explaining how to configure OpenClaw execution policy to 'open' mode via JSON config or CLI commands, with security warnings.
Code editor showing validation error with list of accepted permission values including acs:access_record, acs:device, admin:app, admin:badge, aily:data_asset scopes.
